title: Identify carryover water or continuous accounting
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify carryover water or continuous accounting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine excess water available at the end of water year

pcs.text: Confirm entitlement and current water holding account
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm entitlement and current water holding account?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm entitlement and current water holding account.

pcs.text: Determine regulatory limits on amount of water that can be carried over
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine regulatory limits on amount of water that can be carried over?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine regulatory limits on amount of water that can be carried over.

pcs.text: Determine quantities of water to carryover, sell or park
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine quantities of water to carryover, sell or park?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine quantities of water to carryover, sell or park.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine excess water available at the end of water year

elements.title: Consider options for water that may be sold or carried over or parked

pcs.text: Monitor long term weather and water allocation announcements, and other announcements that may affect water trading decisions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor long term weather and water allocation announcements, and other announcements that may affect water trading decisions.

pcs.text: Research storage facilities where carryover or continuous accounting water may be stored
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research storage facilities where carryover or continuous accounting water may be stored?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research storage facilities where carryover or continuous accounting water may be stored.

pcs.text: Research trading zones where water may be sold prior to end of water year
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research trading zones where water may be sold prior to end of water year?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research trading zones where water may be sold prior to end of water year.

pcs.text: Research regulations and rules that apply to storing and/or selling carryover or continuous accounting water

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research regulations and rules that apply to storing and/or selling carryover or continuous accounting water.

pcs.text: Determine costs of storing water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine costs of storing water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine costs of storing water.

pcs.text: Undertake cost benefit analysis and risk analysis related to selling, buying or retaining water as carryover or continuous accounting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake cost benefit analysis and risk analysis related to selling, buying or retaining water as carryover or continuous accounting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake cost benefit analysis and risk analysis related to selling, buying or retaining water as carryover or continuous accounting.

pcs.text: Identify water loss risks associated with having water in account that is not carried over, sold or parked at end of water year
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water loss risks associated with having water in account that is not carried over, sold or parked at end of water year?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water loss risks associated with having water in account that is not carried over, sold or parked at end of water year.

pcs.text: Decide quantity of water to store as carryover or continuous accounting water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decide quantity of water to store as carryover or continuous accounting water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decide quantity of water to store as carryover or continuous accounting water.

pcs.text: Identify platforms, water brokers and other trading options to facilitate the holding of water as carryover or continuous accounting

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select water trading platform and/or engage water broker to facilitate carryover water transaction if required.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm terms and conditions of carryover water or continuous accounting contract.

pcs.text: Commit to carryover water or continuous accounting transaction and complete transaction using appropriate water broker, trading platform or other method

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake ongoing requirements that apply to transaction, if required.
